sep='\n'

created='2026-05-22 | 07:17 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_after_bem841_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])

if status_in=='triad_present' or not missing:
    status='process_protocol_selected'

    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_dispatch_result_probe.json')

    created_files.append(str(p))

elif 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:

    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 Claude runtime proof probe after dispatch result exists','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
else:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem843_real_response_required.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-843 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: respond to the current architecture/protocol agreement request. Write a real Claude response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem843_claude_response.md. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Explain remaining blocker if any. This must not be a runtime blocker placeholder. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_real_response_dispatch.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 real Claude response retry after runtime/dispatch proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='real_response_retry_queued'

state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'bem842_status':status_in,'bem842_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_execute_after_bem842.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_execute_after_bem842.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Execute After BEM-842 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_execute_after_bem842.json','governance/reports/bem843_execute_after_bem842.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
